name: Strawberry-Rhubarb Betty
recipeIngredient: 3 slices Bread, cut into cubes (1 1/2 c.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a saucepan.
Add rhubarb. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly. Remove from heat. Stir in strawberries.
2. Combine bread, cracker crumbs, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a small bowl. Stir in butter.
3. Spoon half of the fruit mixture into a 1 1/2 quart baking dish. Cover with half of the bread mixture. Repeat the layering. Cover. Bake for 20 minutes.
Uncover, Bake for 10 more minutes.
